name: The Tee Box Indoor Golf
about: The Tee Box in Griswold, Iowa, is a family-owned indoor golf facility open seasonally from September through mid-April. Housed in a converted space on Main Street, the venue features a single Full Swing golf simulator equipped with ION3 camera technology and dual-tracking systems to capture real ball flight. Beyond the virtual fairways, the establishment offers a casual bar atmosphere with multiple TVs for watching sports, darts, and a jukebox, making it a social hub for the local community during the colder months. The simulator is often used to broadcast major sporting events like Iowa Hawkeyes games when not in use for golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing simulator with official PGA Tour licensing
Selection of over 50 famous world-renowned courses
Casual sports bar environment with food and TVs
Family-owned operation with a welcoming atmosphere
Loyalty program offering a free hour after 5 visits

food_and_drink.notes: Frozen pizzas, chips, candy bars, nuts. Outside food allowed.

simulator_hardware.notes: Features ION3 camera and 4 high-speed Linescan cameras for dual-tracking technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, provided they are clean. The venue has basic right-handed sets and a few left-handed clubs available for borrowing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring your own food and drinks. The venue offers frozen pizzas and snacks but encourages supporting local businesses.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, 1 person can play 18 holes in 1 hour. For 2 players, 18 holes takes approximately 2 hours.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children are welcome to play on the simulator as long as they are accompanied by an adult. Families are recommended to book before 8 p.m.
